name: Chicken-Asparagus Rolls
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Chablis or White Dry Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap off the tough ends of asparagus and remove scales with a vegetable peeler. Set aside.
2. Trim any visible fat from the chicken breasts.
3. Place each chicken breast between wax paper and flatten to 1/4 inch thickness.
4. Arrange 3 asparagus spears on each flattened chicken breast and top with shredded cheese.
5. Roll up the chicken and asparagus lengthwise, securing with wooden picks.
6. Place seam side down in a 10-inch glass pie plate coated with cooking spray.
7. Cover with plastic wrap, venting one corner. Microwave at high for 5-6 minutes or until cooked through. Let rolls stand covered for 5 minutes.
8. In a 1-quart glass measure, combine mushrooms and wine; microwave at high for 2-3 minutes, stirring once.
9. Stir in lime juice, dried tarragon, and minced parsley.
10. To serve, remove chicken rolls from the cooking liquid and spoon mushroom sauce over the rolls.
About 194 Calories per Roll and 1/4 Cup Sauce. (Fat 6.1%, Cholesterol 79).
